items.name: Fresh Herb Chutney [16oz]
items.description: Vinegar, herbs, garlic, and chillis combine to make this a mouthwatering, spicy, and tangy, chutney. Your Kabobs and grilled meat will be enhanced by the Fresh Herb Chutney but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.

items.description: Our mildest of the four chutneys. The avocado chutney is a delightful addition to your delicious Turnovers and most vegetarian dishes but, of course, you may add to any dish you choose or enjoy as a dipping sauce.

items.name: Red Chili Chutney [16oz]
items.description: This is the spiciest of our four chutneys but still mild enough not to require a warning label. The Red Chili Chutney will enhance your kabobs, your potatoes, and any other dish you want to spice up or you may enjoy as a dipping sauce.
